name: Duke Maifluer
description: A fairy duke who presides over the court of Diuthurnia. Jack was swept into his revel in Session 3 and promptly insulted him by attempting to ride his prized stuffed boar hunting trophy. The Duke's goodwill toward Jack was lost entirely.
notes: Jack was brought to Diuthurnia by a company of fairies and spent time at the Duke's court before insulting his pride. The Duke's favor has not been recovered.
Maintains hunting grounds in the Table Downs to the north.
